summary.shape_sentence: Failed morning V-recovery into lower-high distribution, then steady afternoon bear drift closing near lows.

goat.note: Strongest move was the post-flush V-reversal from roughly 25,455 to 25,665.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels on the screenshot; bearish pivots align with the 10:12 HOD, 10:45 lower high, 12:50 lower high, and 14:00 failed bounce.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels on the screenshot; bullish response was strongest only at the 09:42 V-bottom.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; supply behaved around 25,635–25,665 and was respected after the morning failure.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; demand near 25,455 initially held but broke late, producing the 25,417 LOD.

time_markers.10am_blue: Strong recovery underway after the opening flush; buyers pressing toward the eventual HOD.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market below morning highs, stabilizing around 25,535 but structurally weaker.
time_markers.2pm_green: Failed bounce/lower-high area near 25,525; sellers retained control.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Late selloff into the close; close near session lows after a small bounce from LOD.

takeaway: Bearish failed-reversal day: the morning V-bottom produced the cleanest upside move, but the HOD failed, supply held, and the afternoon resolved into a controlled selloff closing near lows.
